title: AircraftInfo
description: Documentation artifact, not wired into any runtime validation. Describes the normalized aircraft object ('info') built by normalizeOpenSky() and normalizeAdsbExchange() in static/index.html, consumed by renderDetailsHtml() for the sidebar. Every property is a field the app actually populates on every aircraft today (its value may still be null, and several are enrichment-only — populated only when the same aircraft is also visible on adsb.fi/airplanes.live, since OpenSky's own state vector has no equivalent field). Field-by-field source: parseOpenSkyState() and normalizeOpenSky() (static/index.html:1083-1149), parseAdsbExchangeAircraft() and normalizeAdsbExchange() (static/index.html:1188-1271). Raw wire formats confirmed against live requests, not just documentation: OpenSky /states/all (with and without extended=1 — app.py's fetch_states() now sends it), adsb.fi opendata v3, airplanes.live v2 point lookup. Deliberately excluded from this schema: raw adsb.fi/airplanes.live fields 'dst'/'dir' (distance/bearing of the aircraft from the query's center point) — these describe the request, not the aircraft, and would change per-query rather than being a stable property of the aircraft itself.

icao24.description: 24-bit ICAO transponder address (hex), lowercase as reported by the source and uppercased only for sidebar display. OpenSky state vector index 0 / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'hex' (also the shared dedup/enrichment key across all five ICAO24-based sources, and the Map key in openskyMarkers/adsbfiMarkers/etc.). Always null for FlightAware, which is flight-centric (identifies by fa_flight_id/callsign) and has no ICAO24/hex field at all.

callsign.description: Flight callsign, trimmed; null if blank. OpenSky state vector index 1 (raw, untrimmed) / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'flight' (raw, untrimmed).

registration.description: Tail number. Not present in OpenSky's own state vector at all — only ever populated via enrichment from adsb.fi/airplanes.live 'r' when the same ICAO24 is visible there too. Directly from 'r' when the aircraft's primary source is adsb.fi/airplanes.live.

aircraftType.description: Human-readable aircraft type/model. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only for OpenSky-sourced aircraft. adsb.fi/airplanes.live: 'desc' (e.g. 'BOEING 767-300'), falling back to the short ICAO type code 't' (e.g. 'B763') if 'desc' is absent.

originCountry.description: OpenSky state vector index 2. Always null for adsb.fi/airplanes.live-sourced aircraft — neither source reports a country field at all.

categoryDisplay.description: Human-readable DO-260B emitter category label. adsb.fi/airplanes.live: mapped from 'category' (e.g. 'A3'). OpenSky: mapped from state vector index 17 ('category') via OPENSKY_CATEGORY_LABELS — confirmed by live request comparison that OpenSky only includes index 17 at all when the request carries 'extended=1'; app.py's fetch_states() now sends it, so this is populated for OpenSky-sourced aircraft too, not just via adsb.fi/airplanes.live enrichment.

operator.description: Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'ownOp' (registered owner/operator name, e.g. 'FEDERAL EXPRESS CORP'), confirmed present on live traffic. No OpenSky equivalent (absent from the official 17/18-field state vector).

manufactureYear.description: Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'year' (e.g. '2014'), confirmed present on live traffic. No OpenSky equivalent.

altitudeM.description: Barometric altitude, meters. OpenSky state vector index 7 (already meters) / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'alt_baro' (feet, converted × 0.3048; only when numeric — 'alt_baro' is the string 'ground' for a grounded aircraft, handled separately as onGround).

altGeomM.description: Geometric (GNSS) altitude, meters. OpenSky state vector index 13 (already meters) / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'alt_geom' (feet, converted × 0.3048).

verticalRateMs.description: Vertical rate, m/s (positive = climbing). OpenSky state vector index 11 (already m/s) / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'baro_rate', falling back to 'geom_rate' (ft/min, converted × 0.3048/60).

positionSource.description: One of 'ADS-B' | 'ASTERIX' | 'MLAT' | 'FLARM' for OpenSky-sourced aircraft (mapped from state vector index 16, 0-3) or 'ADS-B' | 'MLAT' | 'TIS-B' for adsb.fi/airplanes.live-sourced aircraft (derived from non-emptiness of the raw 'mlat'/'tisb' arrays).

speedKmh.description: Ground speed, km/h. OpenSky state vector index 9 (m/s, converted × 3.6) / adsb.fi & airplanes.live 'gs' (knots, converted × 1.852).

iasKt.description: Indicated airspeed, knots. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only for OpenSky-sourced aircraft. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'ias'.

tasKt.description: True airspeed, knots. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'tas'.

mach.description: Mach number. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'mach'.

trackDeg.description: True ground track, degrees. OpenSky state vector index 10 ('true_track') / adsb.fi & airplanes.live raw field 'track', falling back to 'calc_track' (a computed value) when 'track' is absent — observed live on a military UH-60 (adsb.fi 'dbFlags': 1) that only reported 'calc_track'. Handled in parseAdsbExchangeAircraft().

magHeadingDeg.description: Magnetic heading, degrees. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'mag_heading'.

trueHeadingDeg.description: True heading, degrees. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'true_heading'.

turnRateDegPerSec.description: Turn rate, degrees/second. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'track_rate'.

rollDeg.description: Roll angle, degrees. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'roll'.

navAltitudeM.description: Autopilot-selected altitude, meters. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live 'nav_altitude_mcp', falling back to 'nav_altitude_fms' (feet, converted × 0.3048).

navHeadingDeg.description: Autopilot-selected heading, degrees. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nav_heading'.

navQnh.description: Selected barometric pressure setting, hPa. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nav_qnh'.

navModes.description: Active autopilot modes (e.g. ['autopilot','althold','vnav']); null unless the raw array is non-empty. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nav_modes'.

windDirDeg.description: Wind direction, degrees. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'wd'.

windSpeedKt.description: Wind speed, knots. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'ws'.

oatC.description: Outside air temperature, °C. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'oat'.

tatC.description: Total air temperature, °C. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'tat'.

squawk.description: Transponder squawk code. The universal ICAO emergency codes 7500/7600/7700 are highlighted specially by formatSquawk() regardless of source. OpenSky state vector index 14 / adsb.fi & airplanes.live raw field 'squawk'.

emergency.description: ADSBExchange-style emergency code (e.g. 'medical', 'fuel', 'nordo'); kept only when truthy and not the literal string 'none'. Not present in OpenSky's state vector — enrichment-only for OpenSky-sourced aircraft. adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'emergency'.

hasAlert.description: Never null (always boolean, unlike every other field here). OpenSky state vector index 15 ('spi') / adsb.fi & airplanes.live: true if either raw 'alert' or 'spi' is truthy.

secondsSinceContact.description: Seconds since the last message from this aircraft (any message, not just a position update — see secondsSincePositionUpdate for that distinction). OpenSky: derived as now − state vector index 4 ('last_contact', unix seconds). adsb.fi & airplanes.live: raw field 'seen' (already relative seconds), passed through only when numeric.

dbFlags.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
dbFlags.description: Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'dbFlags', a bitmask: 1=military, 2=interesting, 4=PIA (privacy ICAO address), 8=LADD (limited-display aircraft). Confirmed present on live military traffic (value 1) and other flagged aircraft (values 4, 8) during research. No OpenSky equivalent.

messageType.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
messageType.description: Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'type' — observed live values include 'adsb_icao', 'mlat', 'tisb_icao', 'adsr_icao', 'tisb_trackfile', 'tisb_other'. No OpenSky equivalent (OpenSky exposes an analogous concept only via positionSource, index 16).

adsbVersion.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
adsbVersion.description: Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'version' (ADS-B message version, observed values 0-2). No OpenSky equivalent.

nic.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
nic.description: Navigation Integrity Category (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nic'. No OpenSky equivalent.

nicBaro.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
nicBaro.description: Barometric NIC. Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nic_baro'. No OpenSky equivalent.

nacP.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
nacP.description: Navigation Accuracy Category — Position (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nac_p'. No OpenSky equivalent.

nacV.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
nacV.description: Navigation Accuracy Category — Velocity (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'nac_v'. No OpenSky equivalent.

sil.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
sil.description: Source Integrity Level (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'sil'. No OpenSky equivalent.

silType.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
silType.description: Basis for the SIL value (observed live value: 'perhour'). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'sil_type'. No OpenSky equivalent.

gva.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
gva.description: Geometric Vertical Accuracy (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'gva'. No OpenSky equivalent.

sda.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
sda.description: System Design Assurance (DO-260B). Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'sda'. No OpenSky equivalent.

radiusOfContainmentM.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
radiusOfContainmentM.description: Radius of Containment, meters — a position-integrity measure paired with nic. Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'rc'. No OpenSky equivalent.

messageCount.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
messageCount.description: Total messages received from this aircraft this session, receiver-relative. Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'messages'. No OpenSky equivalent.

signalStrengthDbm.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
signalStrengthDbm.description: Last message signal strength, dBm, receiver-relative. Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'rssi'. No OpenSky equivalent.

secondsSincePositionUpdate.$comment: Group: Signal & Data Quality, no UI group yet
secondsSincePositionUpdate.description: Seconds since the last *position* update specifically — distinct from secondsSinceContact, which counts since the last message of any kind. Available as adsb.fi/airplanes.live raw field 'seen_pos'. No OpenSky equivalent.

originAirport.description: Formatted origin airport name and IATA code, e.g. 'Catania-Fontanarossa Airport (CTA)'. FlightAware AeroAPI-only: extracted from the 'origin' object's 'name' and 'code_iata' fields. No OpenSky or adsb.fi/airplanes.live equivalent.

destinationAirport.description: Formatted destination airport name and IATA code, e.g. 'Belgrade Nikola Tesla Int'l (BEG)'. FlightAware AeroAPI-only: extracted from the 'destination' object's 'name' and 'code_iata' fields. No OpenSky or adsb.fi/airplanes.live equivalent.
